info.name: FitConnect API
info.description:
Complete API collection for FitConnect backend.

Variables:
- base_url: https://fitconnectbackend-production.up.railway.app/api/v1
- token: Firebase ID token (get from firebase-auth-test app)
- admin_token: Firebase ID token for admin user

request.description: Called after any Firebase sign-in (Google, Apple, Phone). Creates user in DB if new.
Revokes Firebase refresh tokens. Mobile must also call FirebaseAuth.signOut().

body.raw:
{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "date_of_birth": "1995-06-15",
  "gender": "male",
  "fitness_goals": ["weight_loss", "muscle_gain"],
  "fitness_level": "intermediate",
  "workout_types": ["gym", "running", "yoga"],
  "height_cm": 175,
  "weight_kg": 70,
  "preferred_gender_filter": "everyone",
  "bio": "Fitness enthusiast looking for workout partners.",
  "latitude": 28.6139,
  "longitude": 77.2090
}

request.description: Required: name, date_of_birth, gender, fitness_goals, fitness_level

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Jane Smith",
  "specialty": "Personal Trainer",
  "bio": "Certified personal trainer with 5 years experience.",
  "credentials": ["ACE Certified", "CPR Certified"],
  "latitude": 28.6139,
  "longitude": 77.2090
}

request.description: Required: name, specialty, bio, credentials
Returns all photos ordered by position. Position 1 = profile picture.
Upload a photo. Auto-assigned to next available position (1–6). Position 1 is profile picture. Max 6 photos.

formdata.description: New image to replace the existing photo (jpg, png, webp, heic)

request.description:
Replace an existing photo with a new image. Keeps the same position slot. If position 1, avatar_url is updated automatically.

Body: multipart/form-data with field `file`.

formdata.description: Field name = photoId to replace. Add one field per photo.

request.description:
Replace multiple photos in a single request.

Each form field name must be the UUID of the photo to replace, and the value is the new image file.

Example fields:
- `abc-123-uuid` → file1.jpg
- `def-456-uuid` → file2.png

Returns: `{ photos: [...] }` — all replaced photos in order.
Delete a photo by ID. Cannot delete your only remaining photo.
Reorder photos. Position 1 becomes the profile picture (avatar_url). Pass only the photos you want to reorder.
platform: android | ios
Single call for home screen. Returns: user info, sports_categories, trainers (top 10 nearest), fit_buddies (top 10 by compatibility).
Returns professional users sorted by proximity then rating.
Full public profile: specialty, session_rate, years_of_experience, prompts, credentials, rating.
Individual user sends an enquiry to a professional trainer. One enquiry per trainer-client pair.
Trainer gets their list of enquiries with client profiles and distance.
Returns { new, this_week, total } counts for the trainer's enquiries dashboard.
Full detail: client fitness profile, age, distance, prompts, workout types, available times, and their message.
Trainer accepts enquiry. Creates a match and returns match_id to open chat with /messages/:matchId.

query.description: Optional: gym, running, yoga, swimming, cycling, horse_riding, golf, tennis, calisthenics, badminton, climbing, volleyball
Optional: gym, running, yoga, swimming, cycling, horse_riding, golf, tennis, calisthenics, badminton, climbing, volleyball
Optional: YYYY-MM-DD to filter by specific day (calendar tap)

request.description: Returns upcoming events. Use ?date=2026-03-24 to filter by a specific day for the calendar view.

query.description: gym | yoga | physio | sports | pool | crossfit | studio | other | all

request.description: Returns venues (gyms, yoga studios, physio clinics etc.) sorted by distance from user.

query.description: Min 2 characters. Searches: people, trainers, events, venues

request.description: Returns { people, trainers, events, venues } all in one response.
Single-tap daily check-in. Call once per day.

Single call for the full Streaks screen. Returns: streak {current, longest, total}, checked_in_today, motivational message, calendar {year, month, days_in_month, checked_days[]}, goals_progress [{goal, label, progress%}].

Edit any profile field. Allowed: name, email, phone, bio, gender, date_of_birth, height_cm, weight_kg, fitness_level, fitness_goals, workout_types, specialty, credentials, user_type, preferred_gender_filter, preferred_training_time, location, years_of_experience, session_rate, rating, target_audience, prompt_philosophy, prompt_best_result, prompt_love_working.
Pass all photo IDs in desired order. Position 1 becomes new avatar_url.
action: warn | ban | delete_content | none

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Morning Yoga Session",
  "description": "Join us for a relaxing morning yoga session in the park.",
  "start_date": "2026-05-01T07:00:00.000Z",
  "end_date": "2026-05-01T09:00:00.000Z",
  "location": "Mumbai",
  "cover_image_url": "https://example.com/yoga.jpg"
}

request.description: Required: title, start_date, end_date
Omit 'filters' to send to all users. filters: user_type (individual|professional), fitness_level (beginner|intermediate|advanced), fitness_goal, platform (android|ios)
